features.name: virtual class with type and integer parameters
features.description: Code should include a virtual class definition with both a type parameter and an integer parameter
features.snippet: virtual class C#(parameter type T = logic, parameter SIZE = 1); endclass

features.name: typedef using class integer parameter in array dimension
features.description: Code should include a typedef inside a parameterized class that uses the class parameter in array dimension
features.snippet: virtual class C#(parameter type T = logic, parameter SIZE = 1); typedef logic [SIZE-1:0] t_vector; endclass

features.name: typedef of array type using class type parameter
features.description: Code should include a typedef inside a parameterized class that defines an array of the type parameter
features.snippet: virtual class C#(parameter type T = logic, parameter SIZE = 1); typedef T t_array [SIZE-1:0]; endclass

features.name: struct with array member sized by class parameter
features.description: Code should include a struct with an array member whose size uses a class parameter
features.snippet: virtual class C#(parameter SIZE = 1); typedef logic [SIZE-1:0] t_vector; typedef struct { t_vector m0 [2*SIZE-1:0]; } t_struct; endclass

features.name: scope resolution to parameterized class typedef
features.description: Code should include scope resolution operator accessing a typedef from a parameterized class instantiation
features.snippet: typedef logic [7:0] t_t0; C#(t_t0,3)::t_vector v0; C#(t_t0,3)::t_array a0; C#(bit,4)::t_struct s0;
